requirement: Buyer can create a sourcing event for strategic sourcing initiatives.
Buyer can create a sourcing event for operational sourcing initiatives.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal.
Buyer can configure event timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions.
Approval workflows are aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA).
Buyer can track savings (planned, negotiated, cost avoidance).
Buyer can view sourcing-related system settings and administrative configurations.
Buyer can view sourcing event analytics and insights.
Category Managers/Procurement team can initiate and manage strategic sourcing activities for centre-managed commodities and services.
Procurement Admins (Buyers) can initiate and manage operational sourcing activities for immediate or transactional procurement needs.
Users can conduct RFx (RFI, RFP, RFQ) events in the Coupa sourcing module.
Users can conduct auctions (English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, Japanese reverse auction) in the Coupa sourcing module.
Users can leverage three distinct types of reverse auctions (English, Dutch, Japanese) in the Coupa sourcing module to promote competitive bidding and unlock cost-saving opportunities.
Procurement Admins (Buyers) can configure sourcing settings and enable controls in the Coupa sourcing module.
Users can define savings in the Coupa sourcing module.
